By creating a GullakPe account or using: By creating a GullakPe account or using any part of the app, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy.
If you do not agree to these terms, plea: If you do not agree to these terms, please do not register for or use GullakPe.
You must be at least 18 years old and le: You must be at least 18 years old and legally capable of entering into a binding contract to use GullakPe.
You are responsible for ensuring the pho: You are responsible for ensuring the phone number and details you provide during registration are accurate and belong to you.
Access to GullakPe is secured using your: Access to GullakPe is secured using your phone number, a one-time password (OTP), and an MPIN you set during onboarding, or by signing in with your Google account.
You are responsible for keeping your MPI: You are responsible for keeping your MPIN confidential and for all activity that happens under your account. Notify us immediately if you suspect unauthorized access.
Money you add to GullakPe is credited to: Money you add to GullakPe is credited to your in-app wallet after we verify your UPI payment reference. Verification is typically completed within a few hours but may take longer in some cases.
Withdrawal requests are processed to you: Withdrawal requests are processed to your registered bank account after review. GullakPe may set minimum or maximum limits on deposits and withdrawals from time to time.
GullakPe offers savings and investment p: GullakPe offers savings and investment plans, including fixed-return, gold-linked, and market-linked options. Except where a plan explicitly states a guaranteed return, all investments carry risk and returns are not guaranteed.
Some plans have a lock-in duration. With: Some plans have a lock-in duration. Withdrawing before the lock-in period ends may reduce your returns or affect eligibility for certain benefits. Past performance shown in the app is illustrative and not a guarantee of future results.
GullakPe may offer referral cashback and: GullakPe may offer referral cashback and commission rewards for inviting others to join. Reward amounts, eligibility, and the referral program itself may be changed, paused, or discontinued at any time at our discretion.
You agree not to misuse GullakPe, includ: You agree not to misuse GullakPe, including attempting to access other users' accounts, interfering with the app's normal operation, or using the referral program fraudulently.
GullakPe is provided on an \"as availabl: GullakPe is provided on an "as available" basis. To the maximum extent permitted by law, GullakPe is not liable for indirect or consequential losses arising from your use of the app, including investment losses arising from normal market risk.
We may update these Terms of Use from ti: We may update these Terms of Use from time to time. Continuing to use GullakPe after changes are posted means you accept the updated terms.
These terms are governed by the laws of: These terms are governed by the laws of India. If you have questions about these terms, please reach out to us through the support options available in the app.
This page is a general summary provided: This page is a general summary provided for transparency and does not constitute financial or legal advice.
When you create an account, we collect y: When you create an account, we collect your phone number, name, and, if you sign in with Google, your Google profile name and email address.
We also collect information generated by: We also collect information generated by using the app, such as your deposits, withdrawals, wallet balance, investment plan activity, and referral history.
We use your information to create and se: We use your information to create and secure your account, process deposits and withdrawals, show your portfolio and returns, and calculate referral rewards you may be eligible for.
We may also use your phone number to sen: We may also use your phone number to send one-time passwords (OTPs) and important account or transaction notifications.
We do not sell your personal information: We do not sell your personal information. We share only what is necessary with trusted providers who help us operate GullakPe, such as Google (for Google Sign-In) and payment/UPI processing partners.
We may disclose information if required: We may disclose information if required by law or to protect the rights, property, or safety of GullakPe, our users, or the public.
Your MPIN is stored in encrypted (hashed: Your MPIN is stored in encrypted (hashed) form and is never visible to us in plain text. We use industry-standard practices to protect your account, including OTP verification and progressive lockouts after repeated failed login attempts.
We retain your account and transaction i: We retain your account and transaction information for as long as your account is active, and for a reasonable period afterward as required for legal, accounting, or fraud-prevention purposes.
You can update certain profile details f: You can update certain profile details from the Settings page in the app, and you can choose your preferred display language (English or Hindi) at any time using the translate option.
To request access to, correction of, or: To request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data, please contact us through the support options available in the app.
GullakPe stores a small amount of inform: GullakPe stores a small amount of information in your browser, such as your selected display language, so your preferences are remembered on your next visit. We do not use this storage for advertising or tracking.
GullakPe is intended for users who are a: GullakPe is intended for users who are at least 18 years old. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
We may update this Privacy Policy from t: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices. Continuing to use GullakPe after changes are posted means you accept the updated policy.
If you have questions about this Privacy: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or how your data is handled, please reach out to us through the support options available in the app.
We take the security of your financial i: We take the security of your financial information seriously and continue to improve how we protect it.

How do I earn a commission?: How do I earn a commission?
Share your referral link or QR code. Whe: Share your referral link or QR code. When someone signs up through it and makes their first investment, you automatically earn a percentage of that investment (set by GullakPe) - credited straight to your wallet.
Is there a limit to how much I can earn?: Is there a limit to how much I can earn?
No. You earn a commission for every frie: No. You earn a commission for every friend you refer who invests for the first time - there is no cap on the number of referrals.
Instantly. The moment your friend's firs: Instantly. The moment your friend's first investment is confirmed, the commission is credited to your GullakPe wallet - no waiting, no claim step.
Do I earn from my friend's future invest: Do I earn from my friend's future investments too?
No, the commission applies only to their: No, the commission applies only to their first investment on GullakPe.
What if the referral program is paused?: What if the referral program is paused?
GullakPe may enable, disable, or adjust: GullakPe may enable, disable, or adjust the commission rate at any time. Any commission already credited to your wallet is yours to keep.
Only friends who sign up through this li: Only friends who sign up through this link count as your referral.
Answers to common questions about Gullak: Answers to common questions about GullakPe
How do I create a GullakPe account?: How do I create a GullakPe account?
Enter your phone number, verify it with: Enter your phone number, verify it with a one-time password (OTP), then set a 4-digit MPIN. You can also sign in with Google.
What if I forget my MPIN?: What if I forget my MPIN?
Tap \"Forgot MPIN?\" on the login screen: Tap "Forgot MPIN?" on the login screen. We'll verify your phone number with an OTP and let you set a new one.
Is my money and personal data safe?: Is my money and personal data safe?
Your MPIN is stored in encrypted form an: Your MPIN is stored in encrypted form and is never visible to anyone, including GullakPe. Login is protected by OTP verification and progressive lockouts after repeated failed attempts.
How do I add money to my wallet?: How do I add money to my wallet?
Go to Add Money, enter an amount, pay vi: Go to Add Money, enter an amount, pay via UPI, then submit your payment reference number. Once verified, it's credited to your wallet - usually within a few hours.
Go to Withdraw Money and request a withd: Go to Withdraw Money and request a withdrawal to your registered bank account. Requests are processed after a quick review.
Choose a plan, invest an amount from you: Choose a plan, invest an amount from your wallet, and watch your returns grow daily based on that plan's rate. Some plans have a lock-in period before you can withdraw.
Only where a plan explicitly states a gu: Only where a plan explicitly states a guaranteed return. Otherwise, all investments carry risk and past performance shown in the app is illustrative, not a promise of future results.
Can I use the app in Hindi?: Can I use the app in Hindi?
Yes. Tap the translate icon at the top o: Yes. Tap the translate icon at the top of most screens to switch between English and Hindi at any time.
Reach out through the support options av: Reach out through the support options available in the app, or refer to our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy pages for more details on how GullakPe operates.
